business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Includes completed additions, fixtures, permanently installed machinery and equipment, and personal property used to maintain or service the building

Covers actual loss of Business Income sustained due to necessary suspension of operations during the period of restoration; includes net income and continuing normal operating expenses including payroll
Form Number CP 00 10 10 12; total package premium

coverages_discussed.current_limit: 25% of direct physical loss plus deductible, with additional $25,000 if inadequate
coverages_discussed.notes: Additional coverage under Building and Personal Property Coverage Form
Or actual loss amount, whichever is less
Per policy year, or limit shown in Declarations if greater

coverages_discussed.current_limit: 250000 per building; 100000 per premises for business personal property
coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage applies for up to 30 days after acquisition or construction begins; applies when Coinsurance is 80% or more

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Personal Effects And Property Of Others

coverages_discussed.notes: Per premises, cost to research, replace or restore lost information

coverages_discussed.current_limit: 1000 per occurrence; 250 per tree, shrub or plant
coverages_discussed.notes: Covers fences, radio and television antennas, signs, trees, shrubs and plants caused by fire, lightning, explosion, riot or civil commotion, or aircraft
Trailer must be used in business and in insured's care, custody or control at described premises
Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers loss in value of undamaged portion of building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition
Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88); effective 03/15/2026; Coinsurance Additional Condition is suspended; property value agreed to be not less than amount shown in Schedule
Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss caused by equipment breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment

positives: Agreed Value endorsement suspends coinsurance condition, reducing potential penalty exposure
Broad endorsement package including Ordinance or Law, Utility Services, Equipment Breakdown, and Business Income coverage
Coinsurance shown at 80%, qualifying for Coverage Extensions
concerns: Vacancy provision: if building is vacant more than 60 consecutive days, coverage for vandalism, sprinkler leakage, building glass breakage, water damage, theft or attempted theft is excluded, and other covered losses reduced by 15%
Coinsurance condition applies unless Agreed Value endorsement is in effect

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio (SIC Code: 6512)
